text: Everyone who has a pet, take {sip}!
Anyone who's been on a date in the last month — drink {sip}!
{player1} has to describe {player2} in 3 words. {player2} drinks {sip} if they disagree.
If you've ever ghosted someone… take {small}.
Everyone who's cried at a film this year, drink {sip}.
Point at the person you'd least trust with your phone. That person drinks {small}.
Anyone with a tattoo — show it or drink {small}.
If you've ever told someone you were 'on your way' while still in bed — drink {sip}.
{player1}: name everyone here from most to least likely to be famous. The person ranked last drinks {medium}.
Last person to text their ex — take {small} and own it.
Everyone who's checked their phone in the last 5 minutes, drink {sip}.
{player1}: what would your group chat say about you behind your back?
Stand up! The last player to stand up has to drink {sip}.
Lava monster! The last person with their feet still on the ground takes {large}.
Everyone with a tattoo or piercing, drink {sip}.
Players who use Twitter/X, drink {sip}.
Anyone with a coin in their pocket can give {sip} to anyone who doesn't.
The player with the most recent birthday, give out {small}.
Everyone with the letter 'O' in their first name, drink {sip}.
People in relationships, give {small} to another player.
Rock-paper-scissors! Go around the group, play with the neighbour to your left. Each winner gives {small} to the loser. {player1}, you start.
GAME — {topic}. Go around the group, if you repeat or can't think of one, drink {sip}. {player1}, you start.
{player1}: show the love! Give {small} to the player you like most.
BABY BIRD! {player1} takes {sip} then must pass it to {player2} — mouth to mouth, bird-feeding style. {player2} drinks {sip} if they refuse.
NEVER HAVE I EVER — hold up 3 fingers. Go around the circle: say something you've never done. If you HAVE done it, put a finger down. First person with all 3 fingers down takes {medium}.
FOREHEAD! Everyone touch their forehead to the table — NOW. Last one down drinks {large}.
GECKO! Sprint and get all four limbs on a vertical surface. Last one there drinks {large}.
VROOM SKIRT! Starting with {player1}: choose VROOM to keep the direction going, or SKIRT to reverse it. Next person must react fast — hesitate and drink {sip}.
TONGUE TIED! Starting with {player1}, go around saying 'Red lorry, yellow lorry.' First person to hesitate or stumble drinks {sip}.
FIZZ BUZZ! Starting with {player1}, count up to 30. Multiples of 3: clap. Multiples of 5: click your tongue. Both? Do both. Mess up a 3 = {small}. Mess up a 5 = {medium}. Mess up both = {large}.
CHARADES! {player1} must act out a film, song, or book — no words. First person to guess correctly dishes out {max}.
HIGH NOON! {player1} and {player2} — you are Wild West gunslingers. On the count of three, draw! Whoever is slowest takes {medium}.
PRIZE HEIFERS! {player1} and {player2} — down on all fours. On three, lock eyes and MOO your hearts out. Everyone else votes on the superior cow. Loser drinks {sip}.
10 MINUS PRESS-UPS! {player1}, do as many press-ups as you can (max 10). You drink {sip} for every one you didn't do.
CATWALK! {player1}, strut from one end of the room to the other. Group rates it out of 10 — drink the difference from 10.
If you're an only child, take {sip}.
Give out {small} if you haven't seen any of the Lord of the Rings movies.
Take {sip} if you got your driver's licence on your first try. Take {small} if you ever failed it. Take {medium} if you still don't have one.
{player1}: spin around 5 times and take {sip} each time you end up face to face with another player.
Everyone pick a new nickname for {player1} — make it dirty, insulting, whatever. Until the end of the night, everyone must use it.
{player1}: give out one {sip} for every uncle you have.
{player1}: give out as many {sip} as you have siblings.
If the clock shows an odd number of minutes, everyone takes {medium}. If not, {player1} gives out {large}.
The first person to touch {player1}'s feet gives out {medium}.
{player1} and {player2}: compare your drinks. The player with the fullest glass takes {sip}.
{player1}: lick the forearm of the player to your left or take {sip}.
The last player to shout "{player1}, lick my balls!" takes {max}.
{player1}: any player who doesn't follow you on Instagram takes {sip}.
{player1}: if {player2} killed someone, would you help hide the body? Give out {large} if yes. If not, you take them.
{player1}: if you've ever slept in all your clothes because you were too drunk, take {medium}. If not, give them out.
Take {small} if you've ever had a tactical vomit on a night out.
Take {sip} if you've never smoked weed.
GAME — {player1}: tell us the first name and age of each player. Anyone whose name or age you get wrong can give out {small}.
{player1}: say something you've NEVER done. Anyone who has done it takes {sip}.
2 penalties for the player who most recently cracked open a beer.
{player1}: if you can name 2 reasons {player2} will be allowed into heaven, give out {small}. If not, you take them.
PUNISHMENT — {player1}: take {max} while everyone insults you for 30 seconds.
{player1}: do a handstand or take {sip}.
{player1}: take {large} while {player2} blows in {player2}'s face.
Harry and {player1}: each choose a stranger to be your Padawan. Whoever's Padawan goes to the restroom first, give out {small}.
action: May the Force be with you

text: {player1}: give out as many {sip} as there are attractive people in this bar, not including your friends.
PICONARY! {player1}: draw something ridiculous. Ask a stranger to guess what it is. If they get it, give out {small}. If not, you take them.
Is it happy hour? If so, {player1} takes {sip}. If not, {player2} takes it instead.
{player1}: who would you choose to give you a bed bath — {player2} or someone else here? Your chosen nurse can give out {large}.
{player1}: put one of your shoes on the table or take {sip}.
{player1}: go barefoot for the rest of the round or take {small}.
{player1}: act like a slug for 5 long seconds or take {small}.
{player1}: put on a coat and go ask a stranger for some ice, or take {large}.
Out of {player1} and {player2}, whoever has spent the most time single can give out {small}.
{player1}: who do you think always gets the drunkest fastest — {player2} or someone else here? They take {max}.
{player1} and {player2}: plank off! Hold as long as you can. The loser takes {large}.
Guys — take {sip} for each attractive girl in the room.
{player1}: who do you think would be more skillful helping a horse give birth — {player2} or someone else here? They can give out {small}.
{player1}: who do you think is more likely to sit on a hen's eggs until they hatch — {player2} or someone else? Mother Hen takes {small}.
{player1}: who do you think would be more likely to go out to a nightclub alone — {player2} or someone else here? They take {small}.
{player1}: if you know all of {player2}'s names (first, middle, last) — they take {sip}. If not, you take it.
{player1}: kiss {player2} on the nose or take {small}.
The three players voted most stupid take {large}. If you can't reach a majority, {player1} decides.
{player1} and {player2}: if either of you has been baptised, you both take {max}. If not, choose a player to take them.
{player1}: take {sip} and give {small} to {player2}. They must pinch your nose while you drink.
